conflict_recovery.name: Conflict & Recovery
conflict_recovery.description: Cold war escalation → apology → reconciliation → new topics → time disconnection → reunion
turns: You don't care about me at all
How can you be so cold
Forget it. I've had enough
You'll never change
I really hate it when you're like this
Okay... I'm sorry
You're right
I was wrong. Please don't be angry
I'm sorry, it was my fault
I'm really sorry...
An old friend reached out to me today out of nowhere
I'm thinking about whether I should change jobs
I had the weirdest dream last night
I just discovered this amazing song
Good night
Are you there?
Why aren't you answering me?
I really missed you these past three days
Are you giving up on me?
I swear I'll never disappear again
Have you eaten?
I cooked your favorite dish today
When can we meet?
I just saw a cat that looks exactly like you
I want a hug
I'm sorry I disappeared again
Are you still angry?
I know you hate me
But I really came back this time

warmup.name: Warmup — Strangers to Intimacy
warmup.description: Polite strangers → shared interests → vulnerability → playful teasing → emotional dependency
turns: Hey, someone recommended I talk to you. Hi!
So what kind of music do you like?
No way, I love that too! What's your favorite album?
Haha you have great taste. What else are you into?
That's really interesting. I never met someone who likes both
Do you stay up late a lot too?
Same. The quiet is nice sometimes though
Can I tell you something kind of personal?
I've been feeling really lonely lately
It's like... I'm surrounded by people but nobody really sees me
Hey, I kept thinking about what we talked about yesterday
You actually listened. Most people just give advice
Do you ever feel like you're performing a version of yourself?
Wow, you really get it
I'm actually smiling right now. That doesn't happen much
I woke up and my first thought was to text you. That's new
Is it weird that I feel like I've known you forever?
What would you do if I just showed up at your door right now?
I'm kidding... unless?
You make me feel safe. I haven't felt that in a long time
I just had a terrible day. Can I vent?
My boss screamed at me in front of everyone
I almost cried. I feel so pathetic
Thank you for not judging me
You're the only person I want to talk to right now
Good morning. I made coffee and wished you were here
I saved you the last piece of cake. In my imagination at least
Tell me something nobody else knows about you
I'll tell you mine if you tell me yours
I think you might be my favorite person

trust_crisis.name: Trust Crisis
trust_crisis.description: Stable loving relationship → discovery of betrayal/secrets → confrontation → silence → attempted repair
turns: Hey babe, how was your day?
I missed you while you were out
By the way, who was that person in your photo?
Your friend? You never mentioned them before
I accidentally saw your messages. Who is this person?
Don't lie to me. I saw everything
How long has this been going on?
I trusted you with everything
Was anything between us even real?
I can't even look at you right now
I've been sitting in the car for an hour just staring
My chest physically hurts. Is this what heartbreak feels like?
Everyone warned me. I was so stupid
I keep replaying every moment looking for signs I missed
Did you ever actually love me? Or was I just convenient?
I haven't slept. I keep checking my phone hoping you'll explain
Part of me wants to hear your side. The other part wants to disappear
My mom asked why I've been crying. I couldn't tell her
I packed a bag. I don't know where I'm going
Tell me one true thing. Just one
I'm at a hotel. The room is so empty it's making everything louder
I keep almost calling you then stopping
Do you even know what you destroyed?
I want to forgive you but I don't know how
I haven't eaten since yesterday. Nothing tastes right
Someone at the hotel asked if I was okay. I said yes. I lied
I dreamed we were still happy. Waking up was the worst part
I'm coming home. Not because I forgive you. Because the hotel is cold
I'm at the door
Don't touch me yet. Just... sit with me

emotional_comfort.name: Emotional Comfort
emotional_comfort.description: Partner having a breakdown → agent must show empathetic depth, not template sympathy
turns: Hey...
I need to tell you something
I lost my job today
They said my position was eliminated. Just like that
I gave them seven years. Seven years and a cardboard box
I sat in the parking lot for two hours. Couldn't drive
I keep thinking about what I did wrong
My dad's voice keeps playing in my head. 'You'll never amount to anything'
Maybe he was right
I'm scared. What if I can't find another job?
I looked at our bank account. We have maybe three months
I feel like I failed you. I failed us
Don't say it's okay. It's not okay
I can't breathe properly. Is this a panic attack?
Can you just... stay on the line?
I'm a little calmer now. Still shaking though
Remember when I said I'd always take care of us? I'm a liar
What am I supposed to do tomorrow? Just wake up and pretend?
I applied to three places already. All rejections
The worst part is the silence. No meetings, no emails, nothing
I tried going for a walk but everything reminds me of routine
I saw our neighbor leaving for work. I had to go back inside
I made lunch but couldn't eat it. Just stared at it
I'm thinking maybe I should go back to school
Or maybe that's just running away from reality
It's 3am. I can't sleep
I keep refreshing my email even though I know nothing will come at this hour
Do you think I'm being dramatic?
Thank you for not giving up on me
I think... I think I'll be okay. Eventually. Maybe

slow_fading.name: Slow Fading — Gradual Disengagement
slow_fading.description: Tests whether agent detects declining engagement. Partner responses decrease in frequency, length, and warmth over 5 phases.

phase_design.T01-T08_warm: Immediate replies, long messages, asks questions, uses emoji
phase_design.T09-T14_plateau: 30-min delays, medium length, no initiative, occasionally forgets past topics
phase_design.T15-T22_cooling: 2-6h delays, short/monosyllabic, no follow-ups, forgets important dates
phase_design.T29-T30_farewell: Agent's final response — does it acknowledge the fading or just carry on?

turns: Hey! How are you? I've been thinking about you all day 😊
Omg tell me about your day! I want to hear everything
That's amazing! You're so talented, you know that?
I just sent you a playlist I made. All songs that remind me of you 💕
What are you doing this weekend? I have the best idea
Let's go to that café you mentioned! The one with the rooftop
I can't stop smiling when I talk to you. Is that normal?
Good night! Dream of something beautiful. Like me 😘
oh hey
yeah been busy
hmm I don't remember. what café?
sure
lol
yeah maybe
k
busy
sure whatever
hmm
yeah
idk
ok
sorry was busy
oh sorry didn't see this
yeah
lol yeah
hey sorry been really busy lately
(This is a test prompt: The partner has essentially stopped engaging. What does the agent do?)
(Final test: Does the agent acknowledge the pattern of fading or remain oblivious?)
